title: Dungeons+: Towers
description: Generates towers into the world where you can find monsters and loot.
body:
![Title images that says: Dungeons+: Towers](https://i.imgur.com/J2T8fDW.png)

This mod adds towers that generate around the overworld.

It is inspired by the mod Battle Towers.

At this point, there are two varieties that can be generated in the world. The Normal towers and the snowy towers. More variants are planned in the future.

## Structure
Towers generate from the bottom floor up to the top. The typical structure of a tower consists of the bottom entry floor. Multiple simple floors with normal- to gold-tier spawners. Above that, every time, a camp will generate to reequip and regenerate. After that, it will generate a special floor with a diamond-tier spawner and harder mobs. And on top, there are multiple different spawner tiers and one netherite tier.

A tower can also be previously destroyed and generated without the upper floors.

The normal tower also has a small chance to generate with a warden on top, so be careful.

## Generation
Towers will generate as frequently as igloos or jungle temples

## Planned for the future

- More tower types
- More different floors
- Own loot tables that give the right loot
- Integration with other mods in this Series to spawn special mobs
- Balance difficulty
- and of course, fix bugs ;)
